title: Specify lint result envelope (v1)
description: Envelope schema validated by `specrun lint --format json` before stdout emit per RFC-32 §D9. The `version` field is the discriminant any future RM-11 / RM-14 consumer keys on; widening the envelope (new top-level fields, new `summary` keys) is a `version: 2` change and requires updating both this schema and at least one round-trip consumer fixture in the same PR. The inner `LintFinding[]` element shape is owned by RFC-28 via `finding.schema.json`.

version.description: Per RFC-32 §D9 — envelope version discriminant. v1 is the shape defined by this schema.

summary.description: Per RFC-32 §D9 — finding tally by severity. Keys mirror the closed RFC-28 severity enum.

findings.description: Per RFC-32 §D9 — byte-stable list of structured lint findings. Element shape is governed by RFC-28's `finding.schema.json` (relative `$ref` resolved against this schema's directory).
